scenario_name: Bond Vigilante Duration Shock — Bear Steepener

Alpha Quant.position: Forced Gross Deleveraging — Short Basket (Broad Tech)
Alpha Quant.driver: VaR limit breach. 5-day standard deviation expanded past algorithm threshold. Book is being auto-cut.

Macro Titan.position: Short Sovereign Yields via TLT Puts and ZB Futures
Macro Titan.driver: Directional expression of catalyst. Riding bear steepener with unhedged structural conviction.

Pod Shop.position: Factor Beta Neutralization — Short XLK, XLF Sector ETFs
Pod Shop.driver: Center risk system deploying sector hedges as PM drawdowns approach the 3% termination boundary.

Fundamental Tiger.position: Long MSFT, AMZN — Accumulating into Liquidity Vacuum
Fundamental Tiger.driver: Structural buyers stepping into the dislocation created by Quant/Pod forced selling. 3-year FCF thesis unchanged.

Activist Alpha.position: Hold Core Equity / Buy OTM VIX Calls
Activist Alpha.driver: Cannot liquidate 10%+ blocks. Paying Cost of Carry to survive the drawdown while turnaround thesis executes.

crowded_trades.note: EV drag applied — 3/5 agents directionally aligned creates exit liquidity risk

highest_conviction_trade.driver: Artificial liquidity vacuum generated by mechanistic Quant deleveraging of a fundamentally sound, FCF-positive asset. Duration of dislocation: estimated 3-7 sessions.
highest_conviction_trade.invalidation_condition: Sustained breach of MSFT 3-year Free Cash Flow floor OR confirmed revenue deceleration
